prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业近年持续高热推荐，社会热度偏热；甘肃省2026年物理类考生估算约147720人， 较2025年121443人增加约26277人（增幅约21.6%），考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于河北省保定市，非本省院校，在甘 肃无特殊地域偏好。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 11747 → 8060 → 5188 → 11530 → 11675 respectively. Rankings significantly advanced in 2022–2023 (ranking numbers decreased), but notably retreated in 2024–2025 (ranking numbers increased), with a cumulative retreat of approximately 6487 positions over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11675. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Physics Category was 65 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 68 in 2024, and reduced to 55 in 2025. The 2026 plan significantly expands to 82 students, an increase of 27 students (approximately 49%) compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. The university shows no obvious signals in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents. Reputation is stable, Douyin attention is average, and no filing gaps are recorded. There are no significant psychological disturbances in applications. Electrical Engineering is rated A (top nationally), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry, highly aligned with the university's energy and electric power characteristics, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communications have been consistently highly recommended in recent years, with social popularity being relatively high. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Gansu for 2026 is approximately 147,720, an increase of about 26,277 (approximately 21.6%) compared to 121,443 in 2025. The examinee scale has significantly expanded, intensifying competition. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local institution in Gansu, and has no special regional preference in Gansu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 11675, the significant 49% expansion in 2026, the approximately 21.6% increase in Physics Category examinees, and the sustained high popularity of electrical majors: the expansion substantially dilutes competition, but the increase in examinee scale and the attractiveness of popular majors partially offset the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15163, with a range of 14663–15663.

- Computer Science and Technology/Software Engineering.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14663–15663, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (such as Electrical Engineering) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 14600), prioritize reaching for A-level discipline majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 15600), it is recommended to primarily target Tier 2 majors with higher popularity, such as Energy and Power Engineering and Automation, with Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 2102 → 2150 → 1987 → 2078 → 2499, fluctuating narrowly within the 1987–2499 range. In 2025, the ranking shifted to 2499, the highest in the past five years (largest ranking number), with a cumulative backward shift of about 421 positions over the past two years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Gansu was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 5 students in 2024–2025, and further reduced to 4 students in 2026, a decrease of 1 student (20% reduction) compared to 2025. The continuous reduction in enrollment slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to upper-middle-level science and engineering institutions with a very small liberal arts enrollment. The university shows no significant signals in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission files, with stable reputation and no obvious psychological disturbances in application behavior. Its advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering (A-), both science and engineering fields, with no direct disciplinary mapping to History Category majors (Law, Foreign Language and Literature).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category only offers Law and Foreign Language and Literature majors: Law has a hot social popularity but with differentiation and wait-and-see attitude, while foreign language majors are generally lukewarm with a wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Gansu is about 70,980, an increase of about 12,606 (approximately 21.6%) compared to 58,374 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not a local institution, with no special regional preference in Gansu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2499, a 20% enrollment reduction in 2026, an approximately 21.6% increase in History Category examinees, and the differentiation of liberal arts major popularity: the enrollment reduction makes the ranking number smaller (easier to enter), but the significant increase in examinees intensifies competition (harder to enter), with opposite directions and similar magnitudes. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2229, with a range of 1828–2630.
